productDisplayName: Global Desi Women Printed Maroon Kurta
description: CompositionMaroon kurta made of silk, has a round neck, short sleeves, a yoke on the chest with gold and blue tape detailing, a mock buttoned chest placket, gold and blue tape detailing on the cuffs and hem and slit side seamsFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyTrue to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints with a modern cut to give a slimming silhouette, this Indo-Western top blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with churidars or leggings and stilettos.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
